title: macrotyloma biflorum
intro: Macrotyloma biflorum, also known as Horse gram, is a type of legume plant native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Horse gram include reducing blood sugar levels, improving kidney function, and providing essential nutrients like protein, fiber, and iron. In traditional herbal medicine, Horse gram is often prepared as a powder or decoction, which can be consumed as a tea or added to food products, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
